basic.question_text: 在 movies 表中插入一条新电影：'Toy Story 4', 'Josh Cooley', 2019, 100。
basic.question_context: 使用 INSERT INTO movies (columns) VALUES (...)。id 是自增的，不需要手动指定。
basic.reference_sql: INSERT INTO movies (title, director, year, length_minutes) VALUES ('Toy Story 4', 'Josh Cooley', 2019, 100);
accept_alternatives: INSERT INTO movies VALUES (15, 'Toy Story 4', 'Josh Cooley', 2019, 100);
hints: INSERT INTO movies (title, director, year, length_minutes) VALUES (...)
INSERT INTO movies (title, director, year, length_minutes) VALUES ('Toy Story 4', 'Josh Cooley', 2019, 100);
INSERT INTO movies (title, director, year, length_minutes) VALUES ('Toy Story 4', 'Josh Cooley', 2019, 100);
basic.verification_sql: SELECT title FROM movies WHERE title = 'Toy Story 4';

basic.question_text: 向 boxoffice 表插入 Toy Story 4 的票房：movie_id=15, rating=7.8, domestic=434000000, international=639000000。
basic.question_context: INSERT INTO boxoffice VALUES (...)。注意所有列都需要提供值。
accept_alternatives: INSERT INTO boxoffice (movie_id, rating, domestic_sales, international_sales) VALUES (15, 7.8, 434000000, 639000000);
basic.verification_sql: SELECT movie_id FROM boxoffice WHERE movie_id = 15;

basic.question_text: 插入一条新员工：'Alice W.', 'Designer', '2w', 3。使用列名指定方式。
basic.question_context: INSERT INTO employees (name, role, building, years_employed) VALUES (...)。
basic.reference_sql: INSERT INTO employees (name, role, building, years_employed) VALUES ('Alice W.', 'Designer', '2w', 3);
hints: 列出列名：INSERT INTO employees (name, role, building, years_employed) VALUES (...)
INSERT INTO employees (name, role, building, years_employed) VALUES ('Alice W.', 'Designer', '2w', 3);
INSERT INTO employees (name, role, building, years_employed) VALUES ('Alice W.', 'Designer', '2w', 3);
basic.verification_sql: SELECT name FROM employees WHERE name = 'Alice W.';

intermediate.question_text: 一次性插入两条新建筑记录：('3e', 30) 和 ('3w', 28)。
intermediate.question_context: INSERT INTO buildings VALUES ('3e', 30), ('3w', 28); —— 多个 VALUES 用逗号分隔。
intermediate.verification_sql: SELECT building_name FROM buildings WHERE building_name = '3e';

challenge.question_text: 使用 INSERT INTO ... SELECT 语句，将 movies 表中 2010 年之后发行的电影标题和年份复制到一个新需求。由于我们没建新表，改为：向 north_american_cities 插入一条新城市 'Beijing', 'China', 21540000, 39.9, 116.4。
challenge.question_context: INSERT INTO north_american_cities (city, country, population, latitude, longitude) VALUES (...)。
challenge.reference_sql: INSERT INTO north_american_cities (city, country, population, latitude, longitude) VALUES ('Beijing', 'China', 21540000, 39.9, 116.4);
hints: 练习跨表的知识预留题
INSERT INTO north_american_cities (city, country, population, latitude, longitude) VALUES ('Beijing', 'China', 21540000, 39.9, 116.4);
INSERT INTO north_american_cities (city, country, population, latitude, longitude) VALUES ('Beijing', 'China', 21540000, 39.9, 116.4);
challenge.verification_sql: SELECT city FROM north_american_cities WHERE city = 'Beijing';
